transcription.text: The Dalton Trail in the dead of winter. On this road, you better ride the right kind of snow tire. One slip can leave you buried in a ten-foot snowbank, hours from help. We're driving the treacherous Dalton Trail on Sears steel-belted radial snow tires. Tires made to handle the steep climbs and slippery curves, and when you've got to stop, that's when you really appreciate this tire. The way it digs into deep snow, you can feel it work, feel the positive traction. It's the best-performing snow tire we've ever offered. From the radial design and two tough steel belts, to a unique multi-angle tread pattern with more than 2,000 gripping edges. For full tread width traction when winter's at its worst, the Sears steel-belted radial snow tire. Try it on your own Dalton Trail. Radial design, two steel belts, and a deep biting tread. The Sears steel-belted snow tire. The Sears steel-belted radial snow tire. Only at Sears.
